pathways.name: Apple Silicon Mac Transition Path
pathways.description: Bring your Mac app to Apple Silicon. Start with the system architecture, learn the porting workflow, get iOS apps onto Apple Silicon Macs, then dive into Metal optimization for the new TBDR GPU.

pathways.name: Big Sur Design System Path
pathways.description: Adopt the new look of macOS Big Sur. New toolbars, full-height sidebars, custom accent colors, SF Symbols on Mac, and the new typography stack.

pathways.name: Widgets Adoption Path
pathways.description: Build iOS 14 Home Screen widgets from scratch. WidgetKit overview, SwiftUI for widgets, design principles, then the three-part code-along to ship a real widget.

pathways.name: App Clips Path
pathways.description: Ship a lightweight on-demand experience. Start with App Clip fundamentals, configure the URLs and codes, then optimize the experience and design for streamlined flows.

pathways.name: SwiftUI 2.0 Path
pathways.description: Learn SwiftUI's second major release. Apps and Scenes architecture, data flow, lists/grids/outlines, and what's new across the framework.

pathways.name: Swift 5.3 Path
pathways.description: Master Swift 5.3's language additions, runtime improvements, and the expanding standard library packages. Multiple trailing closures, @main, multi-pattern catch, plus Logger.

pathways.name: Catalyst Modernization Path
pathways.description: Bring your iPad app to Mac with first-class polish. What's new in Catalyst, then deeply optimize the interface for the Mac idiom.

pathways.name: iPadOS 14 Path
pathways.description: Adopt iPadOS 14's hallmarks: multi-column sidebars, the new pointer experience, system-wide Scribble for handwriting, and PencilKit's open data model.

pathways.name: watchOS 7 Path
pathways.description: Adopt watchOS 7's redesign and new features. Multiple complications per app, SwiftUI in complications, watch face sharing, design audit, mobility metrics.

pathways.name: ML & Vision Path
pathways.description: Ship on-device ML features. Vision's new hand and body pose detectors, Create ML action classification, PyTorch conversion, and Core ML model deployment & encryption.

pathways.name: ARKit 4 & RealityKit Path
pathways.description: Build location-anchored AR with ARKit 4, leverage the LiDAR scanner for scene understanding, and add interactive content via RealityKit's video materials and physics.

pathways.name: Metal & GPU Path
pathways.description: Master Metal on Apple Silicon Mac's TBDR architecture. Apple GPU fundamentals, optimization, ray tracing, debugging, and Pro Display XDR / HDR pipelines.

pathways.name: Privacy & Security Path
pathways.description: Adopt iOS 14's privacy model. App Tracking Transparency, Limited Photos Library, approximate location, local network privacy, encrypted DNS, and Sign in with Apple updates.

pathways.name: Background Execution Path
pathways.description: Understand how iOS schedules background work. The seven factors, then practical patterns for App Refresh, background pushes, URL sessions, and BGProcessingTask.

clusters.name: Apple Silicon Mac
clusters.description: The single biggest hardware shift in 15 years — porting workflow, security model, app distribution, GPU architecture

clusters.name: macOS Big Sur Design
clusters.description: The new visual language: full-height sidebars, integrated toolbars, large controls, custom accent colors, SF Symbols on Mac

clusters.name: WidgetKit
clusters.description: iOS 14 Home Screen widgets from concept to shipped feature, plus the three-part code-along

clusters.name: App Clips
clusters.description: Lightweight on-demand experiences — fundamentals, configuration, design, optimization

clusters.description: The Apps/Scenes architecture, data flow, lists/grids/outlines, multi-platform templates

clusters.name: Swift 5.3 Language
clusters.description: Multiple trailing closures, @main, multi-pattern catch, runtime perf wins, expanding stdlib packages

clusters.name: iPadOS Pointer & Sidebars
clusters.description: Multi-column SplitViewController, the iPadOS pointer customization API, modern UICollectionView

clusters.name: Scribble & PencilKit
clusters.description: System-wide handwriting input on iPad, plus PencilKit's newly open data model

clusters.name: watchOS 7 Complications & Faces
clusters.description: Multiple complications per app, SwiftUI in complications, watch face sharing, design overhaul

clusters.name: Mobility Metrics & Health
clusters.description: Lab-grade gait analysis from passive iPhone/Apple Watch wear, plus sleep & wind down

clusters.name: Vision & ML
clusters.description: Hand and body pose detection, Create ML action classification, Core ML deployment & encryption

clusters.name: ARKit 4 & RealityKit
clusters.description: Location anchors, LiDAR scene understanding, RealityKit's video materials and physics

clusters.name: Metal on Apple GPU
clusters.description: TBDR architecture comes to the Mac — feature detection, optimization, ray tracing, debugging

clusters.name: HDR & Pro Display XDR
clusters.description: HDR video editing/playback, Pro Display XDR support, ProRes decode acceleration

clusters.name: Privacy 2020
clusters.description: App Tracking Transparency, Limited Photos Library, approximate location, local network privacy

clusters.name: Encrypted DNS & Networking
clusters.description: DoH/DoT support, modern networking, Network framework PrivacyContext

clusters.name: Authentication & Sign in with Apple
clusters.description: Sign in with Apple updates, account upgrade flow, Face ID/Touch ID for the web

clusters.name: Low-Latency HLS
clusters.description: Sub-2-second live streaming with HLS — partial segments, blocking reload, preload hints, delta updates

clusters.name: Audio Workgroups
clusters.description: Critical for realtime audio on Apple Silicon — joining the kernel scheduler's deadline awareness

clusters.name: StoreKit & In-App Purchase
clusters.description: Local IAP testing in Xcode, subscription architecture, Family Sharing for IAP, App Store Connect API

clusters.name: Siri, Intents & Shortcuts
clusters.description: Compact Siri UI, Shortcuts on watchOS, in-app intent handling, Wind Down integration

clusters.name: Background Execution
clusters.description: Why background work runs (or doesn't) and how to be a good citizen

clusters.name: Game Center Redesign
clusters.description: Full UI overhaul with access point, dashboard, collectible achievements, redesigned multiplayer

clusters.name: Xcode 12 & Tooling
clusters.description: Multi-platform templates, code completion 15× faster, animation hitch detection, better test reports
